free_text: AUTHORS FOR THE 2ND REFERENCE. PHASE-SHIFT AND OPTICAL
MODEL ANALYSIS OF ELASTIC SCATTERING IN C12(N,N)C12.
-ELASTIC SCATTERING OF FAST NEUTRONS BY LI-6 AND C-12
5.5 MEV VAN DE GRAAFF ACCELERATOR OF
OVERALL ENERGY RESOLUTION EVALUATED TO BE +- 40 KEV.
TIME OF FLIGHT, FLIGHT PATH = 2 M,  AND
OF SCATTERING CROSS-SECTION AT TWO DIFFERENT ANGLES.
DIAMETER AND 7.5 CM LONG, COUPLED TO 56AVP PHOTO-TUBE,
.EFFICIENCY OF DETECTOR WAS DETERMINED BY MEASURING N-
FLUX EMITTED AT 0 DEG IN P-T AND D-D, USING THE CROSS-
SECTION BY BROLLEY-FOWLER,FAST N-PHYS.PART I(1960) AND
THE N-FLUX WAS MEASURED EITHER BY FAST NEUTRON
MONITOR PLACED AT 90 DEG. OR BY INTEGRATOR CIRCUIT
CORRECTED FOR MULTIPLE SCATTERING OF NEUTRONS IN THE
10 PERCENT IS THE ESTIMATED OVERALL ERROR.
RIGHT CYLINDER 2.5 CM IN DIAMETER, 4 CM HIGH.
ISOTOPIC ENRICHMENT OF LI6 IS 95.3 PERCENT AND SAMPLE
CONTAINED LESS THAN 2 PERC. OF IMPURITY(MAINLY OXYGEN)

CONTAINED LESS THAN 2 PERC. OF IMPURITY(MAINLY OXYGEN)
